books.title: A World of Poetry: Student Book
books.author: Michael Clay Thompson
books.rationale: This volume helps students understand the elements of poetry that poets use to create meaning and beautiful language. Poetic devices are examined through the reading of classic and modern poems.

books.title: The Crescent Moon
books.author: Rabindranath Tagore
books.rationale: This delightful collection of children's poetry was translated from Bengali into English by Tagore himself. Lesson plans will draw from this collection and include links to additional poetry by this famous 19th century author.

books.title: Over the River and Through the Wood: An Anthology of Nineteenth-Century American Children's Poetry
books.author: Karen L. Kilcup (Editor) & Angela Sorby (Editor)
books.rationale: A beautiful collection of 19th century children's poetry for all ages.

books.title: The Poet: Pauline Johnson
books.author: David Robertson & Scott Henderson
books.rationale: A graphic novel biography of one of Canada's famous 19th century poets!

Poetry: Grades 5-6
Poetry Reading: Grade 7
Poetry Reading: Grade 8

books.title: Jump Back, Paul: The Life and Poems of Paul Laurence Dunbar
books.author: Sally Derby
books.rationale: An engaging narrative telling about the life and times of Paul Laurence Dunbar, one of the most widely acclaimed American poets at the end of the 19th century. Dunbar's poetry is woven throughout the narrative so students can understand its context and significance.
